nodes.name: GitHub Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives GitHub webhook events. Register this URL in GitHub repo Settings → Webhooks. Subscribe to: pull_request, pull_request_review, check_suite, push. Set Content-Type to application/json and use GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

nodes.name: Has JIRA Ticket?
nodes.notes: Only proceed if a JIRA ticket ID was found in the PR title or body.

nodes.name: Route by GitHub Event
nodes.notes: Routes to the appropriate JIRA transition based on the GitHub event type and action combination.

nodes.name: JIRA: Transition → In Review
nodes.notes: Moves the JIRA issue to 'In Review'. Set JIRA_TRANSITION_IN_REVIEW env var to your actual transition ID (find via GET /rest/api/3/issue/{key}/transitions).

nodes.name: JIRA: Comment — PR Opened
nodes.notes: Posts an Atlassian Document Format (ADF) comment to the JIRA issue with the PR link and author.

parameters.name: body
